id.description: The unique identifier for the saved filter.

name.description: The display name of the saved filter.

filters.description: The filter selections stored on this preset. Free-form JSON object whose shape is defined by the client (e.g. status, priority, assignedToId, tags, customerId, search, etc.).

displayOrder.description: Sort order used when rendering the list of saved filters. Lower values appear first.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the filter, if attributable.

createdAt.description: When the saved filter was created.

updatedAt.description: When the saved filter was last updated.
